item.description:
Screenlapse 1.1

  • license: point Buy button at the Lemon Squeezy checkout
  • release: production license public key
  • build: regenerate xcodeproj with licensing sources
  • style: drop unused AppKit import in LicensingPopover
  • build: release.sh refuses to ship the dev license key
  • feat(app): popover trial chip + calm trial-ended card
  • feat(app): Settings ▸ License tab (status-hero direction)
  • feat(app): pause capture when trial expired (delivery unaffected)
  • feat(app): own EntitlementManager on AppModel; Settings tab selection
  • feat(app): EntitlementManager observable
  • feat(app): Keychain trial/license stores + bundled-key config
  • feat(app): device-local Keychain wrapper
  • feat(tooling): LicenseTool CLI, dev test public key, Info.plist SLLicensePublicKey
  • feat(core): entitlement state machine
  • feat(core): trial clock with monotonic anti-rollback
  • feat(core): Ed25519 license signer + verifier
  • feat(core): License payload, VerifiedLicense, LicenseError
  • feat(core): Base64URL codec for license tokens
  • release.sh: publish installer to GitHub Releases for download counts
  • docs: trial + licensing implementation plan
  • docs: refine licensing spec — soft watermark + no-subscription copy
  • docs: trial + licensing design spec
  • Changelog page: add favicon links to the template
